g.title: Viewport background, four panel frames, header + footer bands
g.text: KIOSK-005 · gateway status surface (battery gradient + render-tick in sidebar gw-0 row) · 2026-05-19 · single-design v1a · rev 2 (three-layer-aware abstract)
Lab fixture 800x480 × 4 stacked panels · ADR-015-pending substrate per README.md:36
State 4 — battery unknown (Option = None) — "BAT unknown", NOT "0%", NOT "BAT —"

Palette: tools/sarcom-kiosk-lab/src/ui/palette.rs · TEXT_BRIGHT #c0ccd8 · TEXT_DIM #6c7f92 · GREEN #40d080 · AMBER #eab308 · RED #ff3c3c · GREY #6b7280 · GreenAmberRed gradient via existing palette per KIOSK-005:44
Honest-unknowns: NO header-side render-tick · NO LoRa-RX liveness · NO gateway-process liveness · NO fake radio/process signals · KIOSK-005:57-64, 84, 118-120
Map area abstracted in all four panels; three layers (basemap + LIDAR hillshade + OSM XML overlays) per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125 · region.rs:25-71

g.title: Map area abstracted in all four panels with three-layer label per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125. KIOSK-001 owns chrome detail.
Markers omitted — KIOSK-005 focus is the sidebar gw-0 row in each state.
Four sidebars, each focused on the gw-0 row. Other rows abstracted/dim.
Bottom strip in each panel: existing read-only PMTiles, no coord readout.
Map chrome abstracted. No floating buttons, no crosshair.
Per-state callouts. Each render-tick + battery + charging element cited path:line.
